name: Why Men Deserve Less
description:
"Tch, of course MEN would stop showing up."

According to recent reports, men aren't showing up at the club as often.

Apparently, it's becoming less and less worth it to find dates at a club.

Women are becoming more picky and more high-maintenance than ever.

For Gigi, those are all excuses.

Its not that women are demanding more and more for less value,

It's that MEN are becoming more SELFISH and SELF-CENTERED.

At least according to Gigi.

Perhaps you are one of the few good men left, or you are a fellow woman that understands her concerns.

You understand why Men Deserve LESS right?
creator: _Mavuika_
